title: Count Good Triplets in an Array
titleCn: 统计数组中好三元组数目

testcases.input: nums1 = [2,0,1,3], nums2 = [0,1,2,3] Output: 1 Explanation: There are 4 triplets (x,y,z) such that pos1x < pos1y < pos1z. They are (2,0,1), (2,0,3), (2,1,3), and (0,1,3). Out of those triplets, only the triplet (0,1,3) satisfies pos2x < pos2y < pos2z. Hence, there is only 1 good triplet.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: There are 4 triplets (x,y,z) such that pos1x < pos1y < pos1z. They are (2,0,1), (2,0,3), (2,1,3), and (0,1,3). Out of those triplets, only the triplet (0,1,3) satisfies pos2x < pos2y < pos2z. Hence, there is only 1 good triplet.

testcases.input: nums1 = [4,0,1,3,2], nums2 = [4,1,0,2,3] Output: 4 Explanation: The 4 good triplets are (4,0,3), (4,0,2), (4,1,3), and (4,1,2).
